channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Jake Reiner shares grief after parents’ killings as brother faces murder charges
item.description: Jake Reiner, the eldest son of filmmaker Rob Reiner and photographer-producer Michele Reiner, has publicly shared his grief following the shocking deaths of his parents in December. In an emotional es...

item.title: SIU Secures Preservation Orders on Siyabonga Nkosi’s Properties and Luxury Vehicles Over Eskom Contracts
item.description: The Special Investigating Unit (SIU) has obtained a preservation order against businessman Siyabonga Nkosi and his trusts, targeting a portfolio of luxury properties and high-end vehicles following al...

item.title: Macron Emphasises EU Defence Commitment Amidst Shifting US Relations
item.description: French President Emmanuel Macron has reaffirmed Europe's commitment to its mutual defence clause, arguing it’s a tangible pact and “not just words”. The statement comes following a recent incident inv...

item.title: Halifax Fusiliers Celebrate Annual Freedom of the City Parade
item.description: The Halifax Fusiliers, a proud regiment with a deep connection to the city's history, held their annual Freedom of the City parade on Tuesday. The parade, a time-honoured tradition, saw soldiers march...

item.title: Dimples Romana Shares Sincere Birthday Tribute to Longtime Friend Angel Locsin
item.description: Nagbigay ng isang taos-pusong birthday message si Dimples Romana para sa kanyang matagal nang kaibigan na si Angel Locsin, na muling nagpakita ng kanilang matibay na samahan sa showbiz. Sa kanyang men...

item.title: APC Governor of Ebonyi affirms support for Tinubu, rejects imposition of other candidates
item.description: For Ebonyi State, APC governor, Francis Nwifuru, don yan say e no go allow anybody impose candidate for di forthcoming 2027 general elections. Nwifuru talk am during di wedding of him younger brother,...

item.title: Makinde Says Ibadan Opposition Summit Aims to Strengthen Democracy Ahead of 2027 Elections
item.description: Oyo State Governor, Seyi Makinde, don clear the air say the Ibadan summit of opposition leaders no be plot against any single politician, but rather a move to strengthen Nigeria democracy before the 2...

item.title: Nigerian opposition parties agree to pursue single candidate strategy for 2027 elections
item.description: Opposition political parties for Nigeria don come together under one agreement wey dem call the “Ibadan Declaration,” as dem try strengthen their unity ahead of the 2027 general elections. The meeting...

item.title: Australians observe Anzac Day with dawn services in Gallipoli, nationwide and overseas
item.description: Australians observed Anzac Day on 25 April 2026, marking 111 years since the Gallipoli landings. Thousands attended dawn services across the country, in Turkey, and the Middle East, paying tribute to ...

item.title: Donald Trump to address journalists at annual White House Correspondents’ dinner amid media tensions
item.description: President Donald Trump is set to deliver a speech at the White House Correspondents’ Association dinner this Saturday, where he will face journalists he has criticised heavily throughout the week. In ...

item.title: Researchers Create Stable Optical Vortices Using Liquid Crystal Torons for Quantum Communication
item.description: Scientists from the University of Warsaw, Military University of Technology, and Université Clermont Auvergne have developed a new method to create 'optical tornadoes,' swirling beams of light that ca...

item.title: Woman Dies After Car Collision Outside London Nightclub; Accused Charged with Murder
item.description: A social media influencer, Klaudia Zakrzewska, aged 32, has tragically died six days after being involved in a car collision in Soho, central London. The incident occurred on April 19th at approximate...

item.title: Concerns Over Escalation and Strategic Risks in Potential U.S.–Iran Conflict
item.description: The article presents a strongly critical perspective on current geopolitical tensions involving the United States and Iran, centered on commentary from retired U.S. Colonel Douglas Macgregor in a disc...

item.title: Ex-Foreign Affairs Minister Yusuf Tuggar Declares 2027 Bauchi Governorship Bid, Focuses on Agriculture and Security
item.description: Yusuf Maitama Tuggar, wey don serve as Nigeria's Minister of Foreign Affairs, don officially announce say him wan contest for Bauchi State governorship for 2027 election. For him announcement, Tuggar ...

item.title: Rival teachers association adds complexity to ACT education bargaining process
item.description: Teachers in the Australian Capital Territory are weighing industrial action after enterprise bargaining negotiations stalled, while the emergence of a rival professional association has added a new la...

item.title: Lakers take commanding 3-0 lead after overtime win vs Rockets; Celtics secure win against Sixers
item.description: In a key set of NBA playoff matchups, the Los Angeles Lakers secured a crucial overtime victory against the Houston Rockets to take a commanding 3-0 lead in their series. The tightly contested game ex...

item.title: Former Idaho Governor and U.S. Interior Secretary Dirk Kempthorne Passes Away at 74
item.description: Dirk Kempthorne, a prominent American politician who served as both the governor of Idaho and the U.S. Secretary of the Interior, has died at the age of 74. His family confirmed in a public statement ...

item.title: Australia's Political Fracture Driven by Climate and Immigration Tensions
item.description: Political columnist Mark Kenny warns of a potential serious fracture in Australia's political landscape, questioning the stability of the traditional two-party system. He argues that familiar concepts...

item.title: US-Iran peace talks cancelled after planned meeting in Pakistan is called off
item.description: Peace talks between the United States and Iran have been cancelled, with a scheduled meeting in Pakistan not going ahead as planned. The decision comes amid ongoing tensions between the two nations, w...

item.title: Maithreyi Karnoor's 'Gooday Nagar' Explores Life, Love, and a Surreal Future
item.description: Maithreyi Karnoor's short story collection, 'Gooday Nagar,' offers a unique blend of slice-of-life narratives and speculative fiction, all set within the fictional town of Gooday Nagar. The collection...
